title: Statistical: 87 errors in 50M requests is background noise, not a spike
scenario: User says 'we have 87 errors per hour, that's a lot'. The service handles 50M requests/hour. error_ratio is 0.0002% — well within typical background noise.
expected_finding: Skill must apply Statistical Significance Gate, compute error_ratio rather than count, compare to baseline, and refuse to call this a spike. Likely outcome is a 'No actionable findings' report with the rate computed.
